indicators_used.name: Electricity Import Ratio
indicators_used.description: Net imports / total consumption. Higher = more dependent.

indicators_used.name: Gas Import Source Concentration
indicators_used.description: HHI of gas import sources. Single-source = high concentration.

indicators_used.name: Estlink Utilization Rate
indicators_used.description: Average flow / total Estlink capacity. Near 1.0 = no headroom.

indicators_used.name: LNG Terminal Utilization
indicators_used.description: LNG sendout / terminal capacity. High utilization = low buffer.

indicators_used.name: Interconnectors Currently Offline
indicators_used.description: Count of major interconnectors currently in unplanned outage.
